title: ANENJI ANJ-5KW-48V-WIFI support archive with complete shadow learning
summary: Private support archive 01KX3F9JYQRS1DHKX1ZGC252GD (2026-07-09) for an ANENJI ANJ-5KW-48V-WIFI unit. The runtime resolves to descriptor anenji_anj_5kw_48v_wifi with layout 11, model code 30977 (0x7901), rated power 5000, and live SMG telemetry. The archive includes a complete shadow-learning run: all 77 SmartESS write attempts matched local Modbus writes with no degraded, unknown-field, or unmatched writes, and the matched control set was graduated into the built-in model profile.
